summary: EXP-188 complete. Drafted new Section 5.0 dated-event block for Part 5 (Kill-Shot Binary Tests) covering: (a) verbatim before/after of Sydney-Perth and Polaris badge demotions on commit 5021eec, 2026-04-17 07:39 EDT; (b) verbatim before/after of the falsification-rule rewrite ('The Falsification Rule' / binary-knockout body → 'How To Read This Page Correctly' / pre-registration-required body, plus new tagline); (c) flag on the post-window/pre-window pattern (the two demoted rows are exactly the two whose test windows have closed); (d) flag on the CSS-class presentation mismatch (status-confirmed green-check styling retained on demoted rows); cross-reference to EXP-189 for the companion OTS partial concession in commit 6e06efb. Charitable framing: leads with explicit credit for the self-correction. Replacement_html uses the canonical progressive-disclosure wrapper. intro_patch field documents three secondary text substitutions needed in the Part 5 intro paragraphs and Verdict Summary table rows so that the OLD falsification rule no longer appears as the dome's stated rule. Recommended action 'patch' rather than 'close' because the decider must (i) integrate the new 5.0 subsection and (ii) apply the intro_patch substitutions atomically; closing should follow after both land. ISS-1156 / EXP-189 (Timestamp Error tab) is the companion item from the same human note and remains open.
